cleavage agent: digested overnight at 37°C using sequencing grade trypsin
instrument: analyzed using a one-dimensional shot-gun proteomics [EASY nano LC connected with a QE plus Orbitrap mass spectrometer]
labeling: the mass spectrometry proteomics data have been deposited to the Proteome Xchange Consortium
reduction reagent: 30 μL of a 10 mM dithiothreitol solution was added
reduction concentration: 30 μL of a 10 mM dithiothreitol solution was added
